name: Healthy Weight Range Calculator
desc: Healthy Weight Range Calculator. Free online calculator with formula, examples and step-by-step guide.
description: Calculate healthy weight range for height.
seo_title: Healthy Weight Range Calculator – Free Online Tool
seo_description: Use our free healthy weight range calculator to quickly estimate peso_min, peso_max based on altura_cm. No registration needed.
result_context: The rango of weight saludable corresponde a IMC 18.5-24.9; values fuera indican low weight or sobrepeso.
formula_display: Weight minimum = 18.5 × height (m)²; weight maximum = 24.9 × height (m)²
steps: The calculador aplica The formula automatically and muestra results
mistakes: No Verify que altura_cm estén in units correctas antes of Calculate
Redondear values intermedios antes of the calculation final (pierde precisión)
Apply results without Consider contexto individual or condiciones especiales
